0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Plugin System"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extensible plugin architecture for custom memory behavior."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Creating a Plugin"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.core.plugins import MnemosynePlugin\n\nclass AuditPlugin(MnemosynePlugin):\n  name = \"audit-logger\"\n  \n  def on_remember(self, memory):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Stored: {memory.id}\")\n  \n  def on_recall(self, memory):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Recalled: {memory.get('id')}\")\n  \n  def on_consolidate(self, summary):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Consolidated: {summary.get('memory_count', 0)}\")\n  \n  def on_invalidate(self, memory_id):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Invalidated: {memory_id}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Registering"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"mem = Mnemosyne()\n\nmem.plugins.register_plugin(\"audit-logger\", AuditPlugin)\nmem.plugins.discover_plugins()\nplugins = mem.plugins.list_plugins()\nmem.plugins.unload_plugin(\"audit-logger\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Built-in
